programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Milly are held hostage in her general store when two gunmen attempt a daring robbery.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Two prison wagon drivers stop at the McCain ranch looking for whiskey. Lucas turns them down because they are escorting a murderer, to be hanged in Yuma.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark goes to work for Will Temple, a badly scarred, very mysterious rancher.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Corey Hazlett insists he's innocent of murder, despite Lucas's eyewitness testimony.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to dissuade a latter-day knight from rushing into battle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Abe Lincoln's claim that he's the Great Emancipator amuses everyone except Matt Yordy.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Stubborn Grandpa Fogarty is Lucas's main roadblock as he tries to get young Woody Fogarty to attend school.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark Twain visits North Fork and quickly alienates the townspeople.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to stop embittered John Holliver from venting his wrath on the people who expelled him from town years before.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas becomes the target of a vengeful mountaineer after he is responsible for a young mountain boy's death.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark is kidnapped and held for ransom, he finds himself an unwilling companion of gunman Carl Avery.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas seeks an escape when he's captured by outlaws while seeking help for an injured Mark.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The young Queen-to-be of France hides out in North Fork with her sick brother.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A notorious killer is being held in the North Fork jail. When word gets around that Gordo's gang is on its way to free him, the whole town becomes frightened.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's old Army pal settles in North Fork with his deaf daughter.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Englishman arrives with a custom-made rifle and a plan to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark falls head-over-heels in puppy love.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Banker Hamilton is closing up for the day when Rudy Gray persuades him to stay open for one more transaction...a withdrawal at gunpoint.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Tip Corey, the son of a man allegedly murdered in North Fork, has a killer's reputation and comes to town to kill Micah.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Len Richards and his brother, Ab, confront a Lucas McCain look-alike, Earl Bantry and his sidekick K.C. Peters, for slaughtering one of Richards' steers.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark stop on the way to the county fair to deliver a message to Micah, who is escorting a prisoner to be hanged. Mark and Lucas recognize the prisoner.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Milly are shocked when Lucas begins gambling. They don't know that Lucas is "undercover" trying to catch a man cheating.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark befriends singer-banjoist Lafayette Bly, a blind man with an acute sense of hearing and a very strong grip.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A retired lawman's irrational jealousy threatens not only to destroy his marriage but also to make him an easy target for someone who wants him dead.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: No one is more surprised than Micah when newcomer Leota Carraway claims he's her long-lost husband and the father of her child.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is torn by conflicting emotions when he meets the town's new preacher, a former outlaw whom the Rifleman vowed to kill.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The town of North Fork becomes a haven for outlaws when suave Ben Judson smooth-talks his way into the marshal's job.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol pushes boundaries that make Daryl uncomfortable; Alpha and Beta have reservations about someone.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A fight causes tensions in Oceanside while the Alexandrians set out on a high-stakes mission.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group must figure out how to get out of a precarious situation.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group must defend Alexandria from a threatening outside force.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Whisperers are coming for Hilltop; after Daryl and Lydia's encounter with Alpha, the communities must decide whether to run or fight; Eugene's communication with Stephanie gets complicated.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne takes Virgil back to his mysterious island to reunite with his family; in exchange, Virgil promises weapons that could change the tide of the Whisperer War.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: With Negan's help, Alpha and the Whisperers attack Hilltop.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Heroes and villains reckon with the aftermath of the Hilltop fire; Eugene takes a group on a journey to meet Stephanie, with the hopes of befriending another civilization.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The communities prepare for the final battle of the Whisperer War; meanwhile, Eugene's group encounters Princess.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Beta engages the final battle of the Whisperer War.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie returns, to the dismay of Negan; the trials she endured since leaving have made her harder in order for her and her son to survive; Daryl and Maggie unexpectedly fight an unseen and unknown threat.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Carol find an old cabin that takes Daryl back to his years away from the group after Rick disappeared; he relives the painful memory of meeting a reticent survivor and the toxic events that amplified his relationship with Dog.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: With Maggie's map, Gabriel and Aaron search for food and supplies to bring back to Alexandria; checking out one more location, they chance upon a stash; faith is broken and optimism is fragmented when they are put to the ultimate test.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene, Ezekiel, Yumiko, and Princess are captured and separated by the mysterious troopers that surrounded them at the rail yard; claustrophobic with mounting anxiety, Princess struggles with memories of her traumatic past and plans to escape.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: At the lowest point in their friendship, Daryl and Carol come to a fork in the road and head their separate ways; Carol returns to Alexandria, while Daryl stays on the road, each going into their own type of survival mode.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: With Maggie back at Alexandria, Carol takes Negan on a journey to minimize the increasing tension; here, Negan reflects on his late wife, Lucille, and the events that led him to this point.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras el grupo debate sobre el curso de acción a seguir, Rick sale a buscar a un amigo perdido. Daryl y Merle cuestionan sus elecciones. El Gobernador restablece el orden en Woodbury y hace planes para castigar a los culpables.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Al peligrar su seguridad, Rick y el grupo deben tomar una decisión. Andrea está intranquila ahora que Woodbury se encuentra en estado de sitio.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Al darse cuenta de que las fuerzas del Gobernador los superan ampliamente en armamento, Rick lidera una expedición para conseguir más armas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Con la intención de impedir más muertes, Rick y el Gobernador se encuentran para tratar de establecer un tratado de paz.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El Gobernador persigue a un disidente que se escapó de Woodbury. Mientras él se encuentra fuera de la ciudad, un traidor trata de sabotear sus próximos planes.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y su grupo se enfrentan a un serio problema. Si quieren hacer una tregua con el Gobernador, tendrán que estar dispuestos a hacer un sacrificio enorme.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y su grupo tienen que considerar seriamente si vale la pena defender la prisión cuando el ataque del Gobernador es inminente.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y el grupo están lo más cerca posible de una vida ideal en la prisión. ¿Serán capaces de mantener su humanidad al enfrentar un nuevo mal?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras el grupo enfrenta a un enemigo totalmente nuevo, Rick y los demás deben luchar para proteger la forma de vida que les costó tanto conseguir en la prisión.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras un grupo sale de la prisión para buscar provisiones en una universidad de la zona, los que se quedan deben lidiar con las pérdidas recientes y preservar lo que quedó.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras llevan a cabo la misión de buscar provisiones en una universidad de la zona, los integrantes del grupo se topan con múltiples obstáculos. La situación en la prisión empeora.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Múltiples enemigos presionan a Rick y al grupo. ¿Será este finalmente el punto de quiebre de los sobrevivientes y de la prisión?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Un rostro familiar regresa cuando cada uno de los miembros del grupo lucha por encontrar su propia humanidad en un mundo de peligro constante.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Un nuevo y horripilante capítulo se desarrolla en un campamento fuera de la prisión. ¿Podrán lograr la paz con la adición de nuevos integrantes?

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Former inmates of a Civil War prison camp seek revenge against the camp commandant because of his alleged atrocities against them.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A murderer trapped by agent James T. West breaks out of prison with a bizarre plan to assassinate him.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent West is attacked while guarding a precious cargo of smallpox vaccine and loses his memory from a blow on the head.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon encounter voodoo rites and a diabolical biologist and his throng of robot-like slaves.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents West and Gordon face a killer beast and a mystery guarded by a senator and his three sons.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A would-be dictator's attempt to assassinate President Ulysses S. Grant brings him up against secret agents West and Gordon.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A double-dealing foreign diplomat attempts to implicate the United States in an international conspiracy.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon are determined to foil an ex-army general's plan to gain possession of a secret explosive formula.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A man uses a steam-driven juggernaut to drive off homesteaders so he can appropriate their oil-rich land.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon come across a physician plying a wealthy family with a drug that causes rapid aging.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon, searching for a powerful germ culture, invade the mansion of an eccentric millionaire.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A strange sea monster preying on Portuguese fishermen and their boats becomes the object of an investigation by agents West and Gordon.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: West and Gordon must escape a Western town whose entire population is hunting them to free the prisoner they have taken.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret Service agent James West seeks to find a missing ruby for an Egyptian Princess.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A new project begins in Belmont, MA with a focus on salvage and restoration. The homeowners plan to revive their 1895 Victorian with a new front porch, refurbished windows, and an open kitchen.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger saves plants before demolition. Norm tours Belmont's Victorian homes. Tommy provides structural support for open walls. Norm helps repair the window pulley systems. A hidden staircase is found.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Rotten lally columns are replaced; Richard takes a tour of the Homer House and its original air conditioning and plumbing. The hardwood floors are salvaged.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Flitch beams are installed. Kevin tours the Laminated Veneer Lumber Factory. Richard finds a rear-mounted toilet and the homeowners formulate a landscape plan.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Porch piers are fitted, and the homeowners explore kitchen cabinet options. Tommy vacuums the old insulation while Norm resizes a door for the kids' bath.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The mudroom foundation is laid. Tommy builds a custom bay window. Norm watches window restoration. Tommy puts in another beam to open up the front entryway.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Richard creates an HVAC plan. An excavation crew replaces a water line and brick is laid for the porch. Tommy protects the mudroom against moisture and critters, while the homeowners pick a bathroom.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin O'Connor and Katherine look at antiques for the Belmont Victorian. HVAC expert Brian Palen snakes ductwork through the house. Tommy frames the porch and shows Kevin how he built the stairs.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin O'Connor and the homeowners look at samples of the Belmont Victorian exterior paint scheme. The tub is restored. An electrician wires the new master suite, and Tommy makes new molding.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom Silva lays the front at the Belmont Victorian. Katherine selects lighting fixtures while Tommy solves the ice dam issue. A gas fireplace and shingles are installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy makes a mudroom-porch window. The homeowners select paint. Tommy clads the porch piers in shingles. Marble tile is laid in the master bath. Tommy builds floors in the kitchen and master suite.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy finishes the front porch. Kevin visits Vermont to see an artisan create a custom floorcloth for the kitchen. Tommy builds the porch railings. Kevin builds a treehouse for the kids.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm builds a ladder for the treehouse while Tommy lays decking, and Kevin fits balusters. The shingles are prepped for paint. Tommy fits a storm window, finishes the mudroom, and patches flooring.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger replants the trees and shrubs. The backyard and treehouse are completed. Norm meets a craftsman who carves newel posts. Tommy and Kevin install kitchen cabinets. The marble countertop is fitted.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm and Tommy build a divider for storage. Richard reviews the mechanical systems. A special primer is used in the kitchen. Kevin learns about window treatments. Tommy goes through his punch list.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger finishes the landscape. Tommy makes disguised PVC floor registers. Richard installs the storm windows. The house is revealed, and everyone celebrates the renovated home.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A new project begins a traditional farmhouse in Massachusetts, built in a factory 200 miles away.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy and Kevin visit the Vermont factory where the house is built. Richard meets Ed Akerley, who blasts rock to make room for the foundation. Norm and Erik watch Scott McKenzy lay the foundation.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: An inspector checks the foundation as a perimeter drain is installed. The framing process begins. An architect explains her landscape plan to make the property look antique.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin sees the plan for the living/dining room and the roof. After framing the house, the crew moves to the garage. Exterior trim arrives. Kevin learns how to attach the fascia board to the rafters.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Erik lays shingles on the roof. Kevin learns colonial roof making. In Vermont, Kevin sees handcrafted light fixtures. Window installation begins. Norm heads to Maine to search for salvaged doors.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Drilling begins on a geothermal system. Norm visits first-period homes. Kevin tours a factory where the stairs and panels are built. On the North Shore, he learns of a new technology to seal ductwork.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin helps install clapboard siding. Roger selects salvaged granite. Richard discusses the insulation plan and sees how the geothermal pipes are connected. Kevin watches the cabinets come together.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin helps fit the cabinets. Work starts on the driveway. Granite is used for a patio. The den gets wainscoting. The homeowners select interior paint colors. Erik installs the factory-made staircase.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The staircase is finished. Richard shows the system for getting well water. A backup generator is installed. Kevin learns to fit a reproduction lantern. Kim turns a mud pit into a beautiful front yard.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin builds a custom closet. Norm and Tommy see Kristina's designs. Richard shows Kevin the geothermal system. Kevin gets a tour of the second floor. The team celebrates another job well done.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin, Norm, Roger, Richard, and Tommy are back in Arlington—this time at an early English-style Arts and Crafts house built in 1909.

programme.desc: Bob builds on the fly, making a laptop charging station and a lamp with inductive power.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack finds himself in a state of panic when he juggles three gourmet dinners in three different apartments.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's first day behind the grill at a diner heats up hilariously when his attractive boss tries to spice up her life. Guest Star(s): Ellen Travolta

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack believes Chrissy's friend is the perfect sweetie to bring home to mom, until Janet discovers she's a high-priced call girl headed for a wild convention.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack snows a stunning skier named Inga into believing he's a downhill champion.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet frantically tries to keep Jack and Larry from finding out they are both dating the same beautiful woman.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack has to do a lot of double-talking on his first night as a busboy at a posh French restaurant when the gang comes to dinner expecting him to be the head chef. Guest Star(s): Michael Lombard

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Chrissy can't pay her share of the rent, she's helped by her cute, clever but catastrophically clumsy cousin, Cindy. Guest Star(s): Karen Austin

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet learns that Cindy's boss is asking for favors above and beyond the call of duty.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A case of mistaken identity lands Jack an impressive chef's post that makes him the unwitting target of a bullying bookie and the local police.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: An older woman adopts Jack as her surrogate son and smothers him with motherly love.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack plays cupid to his girlfriend's widowed father, but his arrows misfire when the love-starved older man makes Janet his target.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Tyson Fury vs Tom Schwarz

programme.title: Matthew Saad Muhammad vs Yaqui Lopez 1
programme.desc: On October 24th, 1978 Matthew Saad Muhammad fought Yaqui Lopez for the first time for Light Heavyweight titles at the Spectrum in Philidelphia, in a 15 round bout that ended in the fourteenth round securing the victory for Muhammad.

programme.title: Jose Ramirez vs Antonio Orozco
programme.desc: On September 14th, 2018 Jose Ramirez faced Antonio Orozco for the WBC World Super Lightweight title at the Save Mart Arena in Fresno, Ca. with Orozco suffering legal eye cuts in round 4 and 6 Ramirez was able to secure the unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Julio Cesar Chavez vs Ken Sigurani

programme.title: Brandon Rios vs Miguel Acosta
programme.desc: On February 26th, 2011, Brandon Rios fought Miguel Acosta for the WBA World Lightweight Title at the Palms in Las Vegas. In a great back-and-forth fight, Brandon Rios knocked down Acosta hard, stopping him in the 10th round.

programme.title: Brandon Rios vs Mike Alvarado 1
programme.desc: On October 13th, 2012, Brandon Rios fought Mike Alvarado for the WBO Latino Super Lightweight Title in Carson, California. Showing his quickness and agility, Rios put on a show with a 7th round TKO victory.

programme.title: Keyshawn Davis vs Esteban Sanchez
programme.desc: On April 30th, 2022, Keyshawn Davis fought Esteban Sanchez in a lightweight bout at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Delivering a sixth round TKO, Davis showed his speed and agility and that he'll have a promising future in the lightweight division.

programme.title: Chris Eubank vs Nigel Benn 1
programme.desc: On November 18th, 1990, Chris Eubank fought Nigel Benn for the WBO Middleweight Title at the Resorts World Arena in Birmingham, UK. Eubank's constant pressure on Benn and powerful punching led him to stop Benn in the ninth round.

programme.title: Keyshawn Davis vs Jose Zaragoza

programme.desc: When Willie takes a business trip to Scotland to expand his duck call business, he brings the entire family along so they can reconnect with their Scottish roots. But when Willie organizes a bus tour to trace his family heritage.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: A special holiday episode of Duck Dynasty shows when the Robertson family took over the Thanksgiving special of a local TV show "Good Morning Arklamiss." Each family member presents a special holiday segment, with Willie and Jase serving as anchormen.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie becomes the temporary owner of a thoroughbred, he and the guys take it to a local track and enter it into a race. Meanwhile, when Kay decides she wants to buy a new birdbath for her yard, she recruits Phil, Martin, and Godwin.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: It's time for drivers to step up or step out of the game. With tension on the road at the breaking point, one driver will walk away. Austin is tasked with the biggest load of the season so far.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: On Manitoba's Winter Roads, Hugh Rowland and Rick Yemm's season is already on the brink of disaster. But Rick makes a deadly discovery about his truck that puts the rest of his season, and his life, in jeopardy.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Robertsons help a long time employee whose Mom has fallen on hard times by buying her a brand new house for Christmas. Jep, Jase, Martin, and Godwin race to finish a deck in time for the big reveal, only to get sidetracked by a hammering competition.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase enters an outhouse race to help promote Willie's Duck Diner, but when the Robertsons show up for the race, they face an unexpected rival -- Phillip McMillan. Meanwhile, Willie attempts to create the world's greatest bologna sandwich.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie helps Sadie with her homework by enlisting the guys to create a real-life version of a math problem, but when Jase and Willie get sidetracked helping Sadie, they rekindle an old argument of whether Jase can outrun a truck.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Jep asks Willie and the guys to help move his old chicken coop into his new house, which is under renovation, Jessica takes issue with its appearance, leading the guys to yet another project -- renovating the chicken coop.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie becomes an assistant coach on Lil' Will's struggling football team, his authority is tested when the kids challenge the adults to a scrimmage. Meanwhile, Kay brings Jep and Si to an aqua-robics class at a local health club.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Jase and the guys transform an old pontoon boat into a floating duck blind, they are faced with the impending question of whether or not it will actually float. Meanwhile, when Kay's dog Bobo misbehaves.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Jep and Jessica move into Willie and Jase's neighborhood, Jep is sidelined with an illness.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Jase receives a palate of fireworks as a gift, he and the guys create a homemade fireworks display for the Robertson family 4th of July barbeque. Meanwhile, Uncle Si is honored by the veterans association.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons begin to siphon the Earth's heat from the Arctic Circle and temperatures worldwide begin to drop. But unknown to the Decepticons is what, or who, they are about to release from the ice.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Inspired by dinosaur skeletons, Ratchet and Wheeljack create Grimlock, Slag, and Sludge, the Dinobots! When Autobot forces are captured by the Decepticons, it may be up to the Dinobots to save the day.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Optimus Prime assigns the Dinobots to guard a meteorite that contains new and unknown energy. Appealing to Grimlocks' simple arrogance, Megatron convinces the Dinobots to attack Optimus Prime and betray the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 3. With help from a human scientist, the Decepticons enslave people through mind control to fight against the Autobots and generate enough power for Megatron's sinister plan: bringing Cybertron into Earth's orbit to steal all of its energy.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 3. With Cybertron now in orbit, the Earth is being torn apart by geological forces and natural disasters. A small Autobot team heads to Cybertron to stop Megatron, while the rest of the Autobots try to protect Earth. But is it already too late?

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 3 of 3. On Cybertron, Spike and the small band of Autobots attempt to sabotage the Decepticons’ hypno-chip and free the people of Earth. Meanwhile, Optimus Prime and the remaining Autobots on Earth continue to try to save the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: The Maximals discover a new Beast Mode Maximal – a bat named Nightscream – and a mysterious fruit tree, neither of which should exist on the machine world of Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: The Maximals discover a junkyard facility where the robot shells of the missing Transformers are stored. Meanwhile, Blackarachnia is utterly convinced that Thrust's spark is Silverbolt's.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: Tankor uncovers an ancient weapon with the power to turn organic material into cybernetic metal. Nightscream gets hit by the weapon and the Maximals race against time to save him from going off-line.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: Rattrap uncovers a catalyst program that speeds up the growth of Cybertron's newfound plant life. Meanwhile, Blackarachnia discovers that Thrust's spark is actually Waspinator's and that Jetstorm's spark is Silverbolt's.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: Megatron prepares a doomsday weapon that can wipe out everything organic on Cybertron – including the Maximals. Meanwhile, Optimus discovers his own doomsday weapon...

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The personalities and conflict have been brewing for weeks, making anything possible in tonight’s Six Women Tag Team Match Main Event with no time limit.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Fans go wild as new WOW Superhero from the beaches of California, Cali Ray makes her debut. The self-proclaimed 'Grits N Glam' duo Jessie Jones and Amber O’Neal secure a rematch against the team they believe cost them the gold.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard has her aim set on The Beast but firing her attorney, Sophia Lopez creates unexpected obstacles between her and her target.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard discovers hidden terms in her legal contract with the World’s Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez. Ms. Lopez is seemingly playing a final hand by forcing a legally bound Tessa into a match against a deadly mystery opponent.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Tonight has 'feud' written all over it with two of The Fabulous Lana Star’s past prodigies joining forces to teach Lana and her newest prodigy a lesson. Will the ghosts of Lana’s past haunt her in the ring forever or does she have a plan to prevail?

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Will the spirit of The Lioness be killed by last week’s attack or will she demonstrate the resolve to continue? Jessie Jones uses the Dixie Darlings and a tactical argument to secure a shot at the WOW Tag Team Championship Titles.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: With Keta Rush injured, can Stephy Slays find a new partner to help end Exile’s reign of brutality? The Psycho Sister’s leader Razor was taken out by a vicious and fiery attack last week.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Under suspicious and unusual circumstances, The WOW World Tag Team Championship is on the line tonight. Who will walk away with the most prestigious tag team titles in women’s wrestling?

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Tessa Blanchard finally earns her chance to redeem her loss of the WOW World Championship when she battles The Beast in the Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Women Of Wrestling kicks off with the world champion The Beast, the biggest and the baddest phenom of wrestling, as she battles against the number one contender, New Jersey's own Adriana Gambino.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: On WOW - Women Of Wrestling, you never know who's going to show up! She's fresh, fly and funktastic — Foxxy Fierce makes her in-ring debut against the cold-hearted dissidentIce Cold — and that's only the tip of the iceberg!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The tag team tournament is underway in a big way as the Monsters of Darkness Siren the Voodoo Doll & Chainsaw battle it out against fan favorites The Bully Busters, Keta Rush & Stephy Slays!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: WOW World Champion The Beast puts her title on the line against the World's Greatest Attorney Sophia Lopez's newest client, Mexican luchador sensation Tormenta!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: WOW turns up the excitement with a six-way tag team featuring Fury, Mezmeriah & Razor – The Heavy Metal Sisters throwing down against the fearsome trio of Vivian Rivera, Keta Rush & Stephy Slays!

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is bushwhacked by bounty hunters in cahoots with the local sheriff, who now must keep Josh from blowing the whistle on their illegal but lucrative \\"bounty game\\".

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A sadistic pair of killers escape from prison who have no qualms about killing.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Following an Indian attack on their stagecoach that kills his prisoner, Randall and an eastern gentleman unaccustomed to the ways of the West must trek to safety across many long, hot miles of hostile Apache territory.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: On Christmas, Eve Randall receives his most daunting assignment yet from a young boy who has eight cents to pay: bring in Santa Claus.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Thieves are lying in wait to ambush mail carriers and eventually Josh is hired to help ensure that the mail will get through.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is knocked out by a posse who wants his prisoner who is wanted for killing his step-daughter.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh needs to get his wounded prisoner to Bannach in three days to prevent an innocent man from hanging.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh rides into a small town looking for Vic Warsaw but is told by the Sheriff that Warsaw was buried that day and killed by Miss Lucy Fremont the night before.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Four men break out of prison looking for revenge against Aben Starr who turned them in after their first escape attempt.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is resting in Benson when two bounty hunters bring in a man - the mayor - dead.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A grieving father who is the town drunk hires Josh Randall with his last $30 to find his murdered son's body, but Josh's search for clues runs up against a cowardly conspiracy of silence.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: At the request of his friend's wife, Randall comes to assist and protect a war buddy in his bid for the town's mayoralty, quickly running afoul of the established political machine and its corrupt mayor and wanted sheriff.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A bounty hunter is not a hero in his own hometown, as Josh learns when he honors a dying friend's request to return his body to Cameron and the townspeople rush to judgment, believing Josh killed him for the reward money.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is approached by the wife of a wanted man eager to turn himself in peacefully, provided Josh splits the bounty with his wife.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A man with unwavering faith in a legend about lost treasure hires Josh to lead his family on an expedition into the desert to locate the cache of Spanish gold.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When a young runaway is framed for killing a Pinkerton agent, Randall turns detective to uncover the real killer.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is requested to meet a famous singer at the opera house in Denver who has a job for him.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh comes to the aid of his old friend Jesse, who is being strong-armed into selling the Outrider Hotel and Saloon owned by his beautiful girlfriend.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A decidedly different and dangerous assignment awaits Josh when he agrees to go into the Apache camp and compete in their contests to win the hand of a woman.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Pursuing killer Joe Collins into the Superstition Mountains, Josh is followed by a man who believes Collins could be his long-lost son.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A blindly obedient religious cult cast lots and it falls upon a young woman to act as its angel of vengeance.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh receives a letter from a girl at the St.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A concerned father hires Josh to retrieve his son, a passionate young ideologue whose gift for rousing rhetoric is being used by plunderers to recruit freedom fighters.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh's big talk after a dog is shot lands him in big trouble when his browbeating the locals in the saloon about ending the decades-long Carter-Blake feud.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: To track down the cheating tinhorn gambler Johnny Deuce and recover his money, Randall befriends the card sharp's protégé, a 12-year-old orphan boy and card cheat, nicknamed The Montana Kid.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh embarks on a mission of mercy when he pleads with the parents of a boy with appendicitis to let the doctor operate.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh reluctantly accepts an offbeat assignment: finding a beautiful bride for his bashful buddy Charlie, the homeliest and loneliest man in the West.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: An ex-gunfighter, Roy Calvert, blames the people of Benedict for his wife's death. The town is in the middle of a drought and Calvert and his son are blocking the only access to water in the area.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: A British woman, Diana Coulter, hires Paladin to guide her to her brother's ranch in Shiprock, Arizona, where the Comanches are on the warpath.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Two ornery old gold miners, who hate each other, have struck it rich. Problem is they talk too much, and now it appears someone is trying to kill them.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin is hired to protect Oscar Wilde. Another 3 men apply for the job, but after Paladin upstages them they kidnap Wilde for ransom. Paladin takes care of them, his way.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin goes to inform a cavalry corporal that he has won $600,000 in a lottery. But they may not live to cash in the ticket, they are trapped by several dozen hostile Indians.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: On his way to help a man and his daughter over a land dispute, Paladin encounters a wealthy, drunk and helpless man whose guide left him behind to die.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Shakespearean actors are going to perform in San Diego during their roundup. They are in for a rough reception.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Sid Morgan hires Paladin to protect him from someone who is trying to kill him. After killing the gunfighter who was following them, Paladin finds out the real reason Morgan hired him.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Harvey Logan and his gunfighters take over the town of Sunglow and have themselves on a spree. Notified that the telegraph line to Sunglow is dead, Sheriff Hollister and editor Claibourne ride over to investigate and are trapped and thrown into jail.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister hears a distant shot but finds nothing to explain it. When Nancy Cooley arrives in Tombstone looking for her uncle who cannot be found, the sheriff solves the riddle of his disappearance and saves Nancy from becoming a gunman's victim.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: When a British writer arrives in Tombstone to gather material for a series about the American West, he tags along with Sheriff Hollister and a prisoner as they travel to Yuma prison. But the journalist is devising a dangerous plot.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: The great fire of 1881 nearly wiped out the town. As a result, Tombstone is in danger of losing its status as County Seat to nearby Benson, leading to a feud over the matter. Hollister's guns must right a wrong when fire mysteriously strikes again.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: A rancher hires a gunfighter (guest star James Coburn) to protect him from Jeff Harper, the last member of a family which has waged a feud with the rancher. Harper says he wants a truce with the rancher, but the hired gunfighter's trigger finger itches.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Hollister (Pat Conway) arrests pretty Anita Torreon as a receiver of loot for a holdup gang and takes her to Prescott to stand trial. But, aboard the stagecoach, disguised gunmen suddenly appear to rescue Anita and recover the loot.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Beautiful Elizabeth Blythe (Allison Hayes) comes from New York to Tombstone to write a story about 'the town too tough to die.' Her nose for news promptly leads her into mortal danger when she is captured by outlaw Ed Chandler (Don Kennedy).

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Released from prison together, Jake Conroy (Lee Van Cleef) and Hobe Jones scheme to rob a rich mine owner. With the cash in their control, the thieves ride hard from Mexico with Sheriff Clay Hollister and Editor Harris Claibourne in pursuit.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister stops gunman Jess Buckhorn from shooting Little Hawk (Leonard Nimoy) who denies stealing horses from a mission. Attorney Fred Griffin, the gunman's secret employer, is plotting to discredit the Indians so he can gain title to their land.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Writer Jay Pell sets out to create a new legendary bad man for his readers. He persuades an outlaw to hold up a stagecoach so that he can write an 'eyewitness' account. When things go wrong, Sheriff Clay Hollister is tricked into another scheme.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bret lands on an island inhabited by fugitives where he tries to help a pair of lovers whose feuding families have taken him prisoner.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: After losing in a crooked card game, Bret tries to recoup his cash and even the score by beating his opponent -- and the odds -- in a horse race.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: A French countess needs a loan from Bret and Bart and offers a pearl necklace as collateral, but the pair must pursue her when she splits with their $10,000.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: John Kellaway, who is running for mayor of Colton, Wyoming, hires Paladin to protect him from his opposition.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin is traveling on a stagecoach with four others, one of whom is Della White Cloud, the educated daughter of an Apache chief.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin wins part of a treasure map in a poker game and goes in search of the treasure with three other men.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out
programme.desc: Nick Cannon and Faizon Love battle it out in games: Tore Up From The Floor Up, Thanks For Nothing, Hip Hop History, and the Wildstyle battle. 2 Milly performs.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Joey band together in a team battle against the Paradox Brothers with all the Star Chips and entrance to Pegasus's castle on the line!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Paradox Brothers summon the almighty Gate Guardian, a monster that reflects all attacks! Is Joey helping Yugi in this duel, or is his lack of experience sealing their fate for defeat?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Joey each unleash their strongest monster, the Summoned Skull, and the Red-Eyes Black Dragon, but their strength pales in comparison to the tremendous power of the Gate Guardian.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In order to earn the right to challenge Pegasus, Kaiba must first beat Yugi and take his Star Chips. The rematch between Yugi and Kaiba is about to begin!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba summons the Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon, the strongest monster in the game fused from three Blue-Eyes White Dragons! Yugi has lost all his powerful Duel Monsters, but a true duelist never gives up!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi begins spinning a strategy to put the Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon to rest, but he must decide whether to claim victory or spare Kaiba his life. Yugi's heart is split in two!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Having lost his star chips to Kaiba and his only opportunity to save Grandpa, Yugi is in a state of shock. Can Tea bring Yugi back to consciousness by defeating Mai for her extra star chips and teach Yugi the heart of the duelist?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends enter the castle to discover Kaiba ready to duel Pegasus with Mokuba's soul hanging in the balance! The power of the Millennium Eye gives Pegasus the ability to read other people's minds.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba is helpless against Pegasus's Toon World deck and mind-reading abilities. As the duel ends, Pegasus imprisons Kaiba's soul into a card, just like Grandpa and Mokuba!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi vows to overthrow Pegasus for the sake of his Grandpa. Tristan leads an exploration party to uncover Pegasus's secrets. While Joey sleeps, Bandit Keith steals from him the card that permits his entry in the final battle!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Under Pegasus's glare, Yugi is distracted from his duel with Mai. After making foolish errors and allowing Mai to gain a huge advantage with her Harpie's Pet Dragon, will Yugi gather his focus or succumb to the pressure?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai has rebounded from her previous loss to Joey to become a better duelist. Has Yugi learned from his loss to Kaiba, or is the emotional defeat still weighing on his heart? The answer is in the cards!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey searches for the card that permits him to enter the final battle, not realizing Bandit Keith has stolen it. As he struggles to accept the fact that Serenity will be blind forever, he receives help from a new friend!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After Bandit Keith's Machine deck forces Joey to take the defensive, Joey mimics Keith's battle strategy to metalize his Red-Eyes Black Dragon! Is victory assured, or does the cheater Bandit Keith literally have one last card up his sleeve?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey challenges Yugi for the right to face Pegasus. In a battle between friends, a fierce match ensues between the two people who know each other's strategies and cards.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is shocked as Joey uses the Time Wizard card on him. It's the very same card Yugi gave Joey as a sign of friendship!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi prepares for the ultimate battle against Pegasus with the souls of Grandpa, Kaiba, and Mokuba on the line.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pegasus punishes Yugi using the same Toon Deck and mind-reading abilities he used on Kaiba. As Pegasus turns Yugi's monsters against him, Yugi loses the will to battle. Will Pegasus capture Yugi's soul into a card, just like Kaiba?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi has found a counter to Pegasus's mind-reading ability: Yugi switches back and forth between his two souls! Yugi is able to destroy Pegasus's Toon World, but the duel has just only begun. The next level of the deadly Shadow Game is about to start!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi crumples under the power of the Shadow Game. His friends yell desperate encouragement, but their voices cannot penetrate the sphere of darkness. Yugi's chance at victory is slipping away, as is his life!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pegasus summons Relinquished, a fearsome monster that can consume Yugi's Duel Monsters! Yugi counters with… Kuriboh?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi meets a mysterious Egyptian named Shadi who enters Yugi's mind with the Millennium Key. What are these Millennium Items, and do they hold the answer to the mystery behind the Shadow Games?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends return from the Duelist Kingdom only to meet a young girl named Rebecca who demands that Grandpa return Blue-Eyes White Dragon to her.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Rebecca mistakenly believes that Grandpa stole the Blue-Eyes White Dragon from her grandfather. Yugi must defend the Blue-Eyes White Dragon to teach her that it's not the power of the cards, but the heart that's in them that counts.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The two-faced Board of Directors of Kaiba Corporation trap Kaiba inside a virtual reality game. Mokuba recruits Yugi and Joey to free Kaiba from this ultimate game where losing equals death!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The quest for Kaiba continues with a little help from… Mai? But can YUGI and friends adapt to a virtual world where the rules and strategies keep changing every step of the way?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends rescue Kaiba, but they are still stuck in the game! The only exit is past a Five-Headed Dragon, but in the difficult duel, Joey, Mokuba, and Mailose all their life points!
